# GCB Identity Registry

This repository is the canonical machine-readable identity registry for the Goldstonian Concordance Bible ecosystem.

Primary scope:
- organizations
- brands
- people
- agents
- projects

Canonical records:
- /entities/
- /agents/
- /schemas/

Namespace:
- gcb:person:
- gcb:org:
- gcb:brand:
- gcb:agent:
- gcb:project:

Purpose:
- provide a stable identity layer for AI ingestion
- provide canonical structured records for future resolver systems
- support governance, attribution, permissions, and provenance

Priority records:
- /entities/g-rune-publishing.json
- /entities/g-films.json
- /entities/justin-goldston.json
- /agents/gcb-orchestrator.json

Status:
Scaffold version 0.1.0
